name: White Rice

pros.title: easy to digest for many people
pros.explanation: That gives white rice a real use case even if the nutrition ceiling is limited.

pros.title: very practical staple base
pros.explanation: It is cheap, familiar, and easy to build meals around almost anywhere.

pros.title: can fit low-fibre or bland-food situations well
pros.explanation: That is a more specific and useful strength than generic meal-anchor praise.

cons.title: fibre is very weak for a grain
cons.explanation: That is one of the clearest reasons it falls behind stronger whole-grain options.

cons.title: glycemic behaviour is rougher than stronger grains
cons.explanation: It tends to hit harder and steadier grains clearly beat it on this axis.

cons.title: refinement strips away much of the grain's upside
cons.explanation: A lot of the bran, fibre, and micronutrient advantage is lost in the refined form.

sourceNotes: Expanded dataset sample for FoodRanked pressure-testing.
Values are approximate representative placeholders for category tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
